# 🚀 Pull Request

## 📝 Description

Briefly describe your changes:
- What feature, fix, or refactor did you implement?
- How does this improve **MyFiubaGymBro**?

### 📸 Media (Optional)
*If you made visual changes (UI/UX), please attach a screenshot or GIF here.*

---

## 🏗️ Type of Change
Please check the option that is relevant:
- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] ♻️ Code refactor (improving code quality without changing behavior)
- [ ] 📝 Documentation update

---

## ✅ Checklist

- [ ] My code runs locally and passes all tests.
- [ ] I have followed the project's layered architecture (FastAPI/React).
- [ ] I have updated the documentation (README/Comments) if necessary.
- [ ] (If applicable) I have created a new Alembic migration for database changes.

---

Thanks for your contribution to **MyFiubaGymBro**! 🎉
